ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_kind" TEXT /* Kind of the item (e.g., Wondrous Item, Weapon, Armor) */,
  "item_subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of the item (e.g., Wrists, Body, Head) */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price of the item in game currency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the item */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the item (e.g., Common, Uncommon, Rare, Very Rare, Legendary) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the item was last updated */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the item */,
  "is_stackable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the item can be stacked */,
  "usage_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of times the item can be used */,
  "effect" TEXT /* Primary effect of the item */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source or origin of the item */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_item_subtype FOREIGN KEY ("item_subtype") REFERENCES item_subtypes ("subtype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_item_kind FOREIGN KEY ("item_kind") REFERENCES item_kinds ("kind_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_kinds" (
  "kind_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each kind of item */,
  "kind_name" TEXT /* Name of the kind (e.g., Wondrous Item, Weapon, Armor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the kind */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon or image associated with the kind */,
  "is_consumable" INTEGER /* Indicates if items of this kind are consumable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kind_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_subtypes" (
  "subtype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subtype of item */,
  "subtype_name" TEXT /* Name of the subtype (e.g., Wrists, Body, Head) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subtype */,
  "kind_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the kind of item the subtype belongs to */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon or image associated with the subtype */,
  "is_equippable" INTEGER /* Indicates if items of this subtype are equippable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subtype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_subtypes_kind_id FOREIGN KEY ("kind_id") REFERENCES item_kinds ("kind_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item the price applies to */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price of the item in game currency */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the price became effective */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the price change */,
  "currency_type" TEXT /* Type of currency used for the price */,
  "is_discounted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the price is discounted */,
  "discount_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the discount, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_prices_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_inventories" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item in the inventory */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of the item in the inventory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory was last updated */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the item is stored */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Indicates if the item is locked or restricted from being moved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_inventories_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item that was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., add, edit, delete) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the change */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the change */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_history_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, designer, QA) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions the user has */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the item */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the item was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser) used for the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
